display_text: Cost: 5100: Dagon 3 is an upgradable intelligence burst damage item that deals 400 magic damage to a targeted enemy and heals the caster for 75% of the damage dealt. Instantly kills illusions. High mana cost and long cooldown for a single-target nuke. Stats: CD: 27s, Mana: 120, Damage: 400, Heal: 75% of damage, Illusion Instakill.

display_text: Cost: 5100: Acts as a finisher in team fights, providing instant magic burst to secure kills on low-health targets. The significant spell lifesteal offers sustain during engagements. Particularly effective against intelligence cores who rely on illusions for survivability.

display_text: Cost: 5100: Situational pick against heroes who create numerous illusions, as Dagon instantly destroys them. Also counters heroes with low magic resistance but high physical bulk. Less effective against BKB or magic-immunity heavy lineups, as the damage is magical.

display_text: Cost: 5100: Core synergy for high-intelligence heroes like Tinker, Puck, or Pugna to amplify their burst damage and provide healing. The spell lifesteal synergizes with other magic damage items. The upgrade mechanic allows it to scale into the late game.
